prerequisites: An AssemblyAI account (sign up at the AssemblyAI dashboard).
An AssemblyAI API key retrieved from the dashboard API Keys page.
A start_date value marking the earliest point from which to sync data.
A subtitle_format value for transcripts that produce subtitle output.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: AssemblyAI authenticates with a single API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. The key is sent in the Authorization header on every REST API request (for example: 'Authorization: <YOUR_API_KEY>'). OAuth is not supported; the API key is the only credential.

setupSteps.title: Create an AssemblyAI account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at the AssemblyAI dashboard. If you already have an account, log in at https://www.assemblyai.com/dashboard/login.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API key
setupSteps.body: Once logged in, open the API Keys page at https://www.assemblyai.com/dashboard/api-keys. Your API key is displayed there. Keep it secure and do not share it publicly; you can regenerate it from the same page if needed.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the required api_key field. This key is used in the Authorization header to authenticate all requests.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync configuration
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date to define the earliest data to sync, and set the required subtitle_format. Optionally provide a request_id to scope the sync to a specific transcript request.

sources.title: How to get your AssemblyAI API key
